news.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
news.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

news.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
news.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

news.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
news.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

news.title: SpaceX IPO closes up 19% and delivers the world’s first trillionaire
news.summary: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

news.title: SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell just gave another hint at a Tesla merger
news.summary: A SpaceX-Tesla merger seems inevitable.

news.title: Valve just imported 13 tons of VR headsets in one day
news.summary: On June 10th, the German container ship Posen docked in Los Angeles after a two-week voyage from Shanghai. news.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO will probably make him the richest person to ever walk the planet. news.summary: You'd be forgiven for thinking this day would never come. news.summary: Elon Musk is now officially the world's first trillionaire. That is a colossal amount of wealth (and by proxy, power) for one individual to have. news.title: Controversial FISA spying law expires tonight. The spying will continue.
news.summary: Section 702 of FISA to expire tonight, but certification lasts until March 2027.

news.title: Meta Employees Absolutely Hate Mark Zuckerberg’s Plan for a Companywide AI Hackathon
news.summary: “I’m not sure that this company supports a hackathon culture anymore,” one employee posted in a forum open to the entire staff.

news.title: ‘Tell Him He’s a Piece of Shit’: Meta’s New AI Unit Is a Total Mess
news.summary: Executives and employees alike are struggling with Meta’s chaotic AI strategy, according to sources and internal discussions reviewed by WIRED.

news.title: Donald Trump’s White House UFC Event Would Be Embarrassing Anywhere
news.summary: A Monster Energy–sponsored MMA show on the White House’s South Lawn was never going to be the height of dignity. But UFC Freedom 250 is failing to clear even the lowest bar.

news.title: Chinese Drivers Are Using Tiny Plastic Heads to Fool Tesla’s Autopilot Safeguards
news.summary: A cottage industry of celebrity figurines, blinking screens, and other DIY gadgets is helping drivers bypass Tesla's distracted-driving controls.
